title: Anybody else have one of these
display_title: Anybody else have one of these
wikitext:
[]: Anybody else have one of these?             Quote Post by Gendo2.0 » Wed Oct 11, 2006 7:11 pm I wonder im the only eva fanboy that has one of these on there car.. Im actualy gonna go with a eva theme when im done with the car (a ghost NERV logo on the hood) just wondering

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed Oct 11, 2006 9:24 pm I have the little "NERV Parking Permit" temporary sticker that came with the early Platinum boxes, but I only put it on when going to cons (and even then it's too small to notice). On one of the Platinum discs, there's a picture of Tiffany Grant with a fan who owns a red Mustang, license plate UNIT-02, with a cover that says "My other car is an Eva unit." Interesting work on the car, though. How are you going to create a custom logo like that? And hey -- it's an Olds, so it's not like you can hurt the resale value...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 11, 2006 10:22 pm drinian wrote: On one of the Platinum discs, there's a picture of Tiffany Grant with a fan who owns a red Mustang, license plate UNIT-02, with a cover that says "My other car is an Eva unit."

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 12, 2006 12:46 am I prefer the bumper sticker employed by one of my former neighbors: My Other Ride is a Panzerkampfwagen.

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Thu Oct 12, 2006 10:18 am BobBQ wrote: I prefer the bumper sticker employed by one of my former neighbors: My Other Ride is a Panzerkampfwagen.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo2.0 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 12:16 pm drinian wrote: I have the little "NERV Parking Permit" temporary sticker that came with the early Platinum boxes, but I only put it on when going to cons (and even then it's too small to notice). On one of the Platinum discs, there's a picture of Tiffany Grant with a fan who owns a red Mustang, license plate UNIT-02, with a cover that says "My other car is an Eva unit." Interesting work on the car, though. How are you going to create a custom logo like that? And hey -- it's an Olds, so it's not like you can hurt the resale value...

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Oct 12, 2006 1:28 pm At the height of my Eva fandom, I actually purchased that decal. Oddly enough, it didn't bring me a cart to put it on.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 3:57 pm I got the parking decal one as well along with a larger red version similar to the one on that car. I donâ€™t put them on my car though as my car is blue and it would look tacky. Plus I need to maintain the professional look for my job so the only sticker on my car is a small American flag in one of the corners of my back window.

[]:             Quote Post by LordBlank » Thu Oct 19, 2006 8:06 pm I'm gonna get one of the bumper stickers that says either "Kaworu dies for your sins" or "Evangelion 10th".

[]:             Quote Post by cyraka » Fri Oct 20, 2006 2:50 pm I have one of those on my car as well. Though no one knows what its about.

[]:             Quote Post by LordBlank » Fri Oct 20, 2006 5:49 pm A wretched hive of scum and villainy. http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=list&genre=04_nerv

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Oct 20, 2006 11:12 pm Lol, "CAUTION" EVA STORE... And the engrish at the top too... EDIT++ KAWORU WALLPAPERS! I also notice they have a store through Yahoo.co.jp? I wonder if it ships to America... EDIT+++ I found out that Yahoo Japan will not ship to foreign countries. :cry:
